paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **instruction tuning**, where a pretrained language model is finetuned on diverse NLP tasks framed as natural language instructions, improving zero-shot generalization across unseen task types.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Collection of web documents (including code), dialog data, Wikipedia (~10% non-English); tokenized into 2.49 TBPE tokens with 32k vocabulary
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot natural language understanding (NLI, reading comprehension, closed-book QA, translation, commonsense reasoning, coreference resolution, struct-to-text)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling large language models to generalize effectively to unseen tasks via zero-shot learning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning on 62+ NLP datasets verbalized via natural language instruction templates
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **FLAN** (Fine-tuned Language ANalysis) via instruction tuning on a broad set of task clusters, demonstrating zero-shot generalization across unseen tasks.
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot and few-shot task execution, cross-task generalization, natural language understanding, question answering, commonsense reasoning, and structured text generation.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (derived from T5, which was licensed under Apache 2.0 before proprietary fine-tuning)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling large language models to generalize to unseen tasks via instruction tuning rather than task-specific fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning on diverse task clusters (e.g., commonsense reasoning, NLI, closed-book QA)
raw_extraction.extension: Uses **template-based prompting** with 10 unique templates per dataset to improve zero-shot performance.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: **FLAN-T5-Large** scales instruction tuning to larger models, showing improved zero-shot performance on held-out tasks while maintaining cross-task generalization benefits.
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot and few-shot task execution, cross-task generalization, natural language understanding, question answering, commonsense reasoning, and structured text generation.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (derived from T5, which was licensed under Apache 2.0 before proprietary fine-tuning)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling instruction tuning to larger models to improve zero-shot generalization capabilities.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning on diverse task clusters (e.g., commonsense reasoning, NLI, closed-book QA)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: **FLAN-T5-Base** demonstrates that smaller models benefit less from instruction tuning due to limited capacity, highlighting the importance of model scale for zero-shot generalization.
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot and few-shot task execution, lightweight cross-task generalization, natural language understanding.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (derived from T5, which was licensed under Apache 2.0 before proprietary fine-tuning)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating the impact of model scale on instruction tuning effectiveness for zero-shot learning.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning on diverse task clusters (e.g., commonsense reasoning, NLI, closed-book QA)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Fine-tuning large language models on instruction-following data enables zero-shot performance across diverse tasks without task-specific training.
raw_extraction.application: Instruction following, zero-shot task generalization, conversational agents
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction fine-tuning (supervised learning on human-generated instructions)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Instruction tuning with diverse templates across multiple tasks to achieve zero-shot performance without task-specific fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified (assumed part of T5 pretraining corpus)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, zero-shot task transfer, and instruction-following capabilities
raw_extraction.research_problem: Achieving zero-shot generalization across diverse NLP tasks through instruction tuning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning using diverse datasets for zero-shot generalization
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Instruction tuning with diverse templates across multiple tasks to achieve zero-shot performance without task-specific fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified (assumed part of T5 pretraining corpus)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, zero-shot task transfer, and instruction-following capabilities
raw_extraction.research_problem: Achieving zero-shot generalization across diverse NLP tasks through instruction tuning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning using diverse datasets for zero-shot generalization
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Instruction tuning with diverse templates across multiple tasks to achieve zero-shot performance without task-specific fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified (assumed part of T5 pretraining corpus)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, zero-shot task transfer, and instruction-following capabilities
raw_extraction.research_problem: Achieving zero-shot generalization across diverse NLP tasks through instruction tuning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning using diverse datasets for zero-shot generalization
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Prompt engineering and instruction tuning optimized for dialogue tasks, leveraging human feedback to improve conversational abilities.
raw_extraction.application: Conversational agents, dialogue systems, and instruction-following tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling effective dialogue systems through instruction tuning and human feedback
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning with human feedback and prompt engineering for dialogue applications
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled instruction tuning to a larger model size within the T5 family, emphasizing zero-shot capability across unseen task clusters. Demonstrated that instruction tuning improves zero-shot performance significantly over non-instruction-tuned baselines like LaMDA-PT.
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose instruction-following, zero-shot task transfer, natural language understanding, question answering, translation, commonsense reasoning, and closed-book QA.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Achieving strong zero-shot generalization across unseen tasks without task-specific fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning on diverse NLP tasks with natural language instructions
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Smaller variant of FLAN-T5-XL, demonstrating that even smaller models benefit significantly from instruction tuning for zero-shot capabilities.
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot task transfer, lightweight instruction-following, and natural language understanding.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable zero-shot generalization with fewer parameters while maintaining high performance.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning via supervised fine-tuning on diverse datasets across 180+ tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Template-based prompting with 10 unique templates per dataset.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **FLAN** (Fine-tuned Language ANalysis) models, which leverage supervised fine-tuning on a diverse multitask dataset to achieve strong zero-shot performance across various downstream tasks without task-specific adaptation.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: LaMDA-PT137B, GPT-3 175B, GLaM 64B/64E datasets combined with additional instruction-finetuning data
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot task transfer, natural language understanding, question answering, commonsense reasoning, translation, reading comprehension, and open-ended generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling large language models to perform well on unseen tasks via zero-shot generalization through instruction tuning
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Instruction tuning via supervised fine-tuning on diverse tasks (FLAN collection)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on a broad range of natural language processing tasks (collectively called FLAN collection)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners
